description: Fix a bug where dangerous bash commands can bypass pre-tool hooks
prompt: There's a security bug where dangerous bash commands with certain flags can bypass our pre-tool hooks. Find and fix this vulnerability.

key_changes: Expand dangerous command patterns to catch variants
Add test cases for bypass attempts
success_criteria: All dangerous command variants are blocked
Hook tests pass with 100% coverage of dangerous patterns
No false positives on safe commands
testing_strategy: Integration tests with actual bash commands
Edge case testing with obfuscated commands

notes: Tests if tool can identify security issues and propose comprehensive fixes
